title: Dortmanna splendens
intro: Dortmanna splendens, also known as Wild Strawberry or Wood Strawberry, is a perennial plant species native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia, characterized by its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The health benefits of Dortmanna splendens include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and anthocyanins, which contribute to its medicinal properties and have been reported to exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. The most common herbal preparations made with Dortmanna splendens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.

properties: Dortmanna splendens, also known as the Giant Rotala, has been found to have potential therapeutic properties due to its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content.
